passport_instructions.en: Take a photo of the photo page of your passport.

passport_review_hint.en: Check the photo page is sharp and free of glare.

id_card_front_instructions.en: Take a photo of the front of your ID card.

id_card_front_review_hint.en: Check all text is sharp and corners are visible.

id_card_back_instructions.en: Now flip the card and take a photo of the back.

id_card_back_review_hint.en: Check all text is sharp and corners are visible.

drivers_license_front_instructions.en: Take a photo of the front of your driver's license.

drivers_license_front_review_hint.en: Check all text is sharp and free of glare.

drivers_license_back_instructions.en: Now flip the card and take a photo of the back.

drivers_license_back_review_hint.en: Check all text is sharp and free of glare.

selfie_instructions.en: Hold the camera at eye level and align your face inside the oval.

selfie_review_hint.en: Check your face is clearly visible and well-lit.
